name: OPTION CARE HEALTH INC
summary: OPTION CARE HEALTH INC provides home and alternate site infusion services. Headquartered in Bannockburn, Illinois, the company offers a range of therapies, including anti-infectives, nutrition support, and immunoglobulin therapy, delivered by nurses and clinicians to patients in their homes or other non-hospital settings. Option Care aims to provide high-quality and cost-effective care in a comfortable and convenient environment.
